auth.title: Sign in
auth.errorSend: Failed to send link. Please try again.

journal.title: Journal
journal.rescueNeedsContext: For a rescue dose, select at least one symptom, circumstance, or add a note.

plan.title: Treatment plan
plan.noMaintenancePumpBody: The treatment plan schedules doses for a maintenance pump. Configure one before continuing.

invitation.qrInstruction: Have the caregiver scan this code and enter the PIN below.
invitation.acceptInstruction: Enter the 6-digit PIN provided by the Admin.
invitation.consentLabel: I agree to share my entries with this household.
invitation.errorLoadList: Could not load the invitations list.
invitation.errorLocked: Too many attempts. Invitation locked for 15 min.
invitation.cameraPermissionDenied: Camera permission denied. Enable it in settings.

peerDoseRecorded.title: Kinhale
peerDoseRecorded.inAppLine: Another caregiver just recorded a dose.

offlineGuard.message: This action requires an internet connection. It will be available again once you are back online.

notificationPreferences.title: Notifications
notificationPreferences.description: Choose which notification types you want to receive. Security and missed dose alerts are always on.
notificationPreferences.saveError: Could not update preference. Please try again.
notificationPreferences.alwaysEnabledTooltip: This notification type is always enabled for your safety.

reminder.label: Dose reminders
reminder.description: Local notifications at times scheduled by the treatment plan.

missed_dose.label: Missed dose
missed_dose.description: Alert when a dose has not been confirmed. Always on.

peer_dose_recorded.label: Peer dose recorded
peer_dose_recorded.description: Notification when another caregiver records a dose.

pump_low.label: Inhaler running low
pump_low.description: Alert when an inhaler reaches the low-dose threshold.

pump_expiring.label: Inhaler expiring
pump_expiring.description: Alert 30 days before an inhaler's expiry date.

dispute_detected.label: Duplicate entry detected
dispute_detected.description: Alert when two caregivers record a dose very close in time.

admin_handover.label: Admin handover
admin_handover.description: Alert when an Admin role transfer is pending.

consent_update_required.label: Terms update
consent_update_required.description: Notification when a new Terms version requires your acceptance.

security_alert.label: Security alert
security_alert.description: Suspicious login, device revocation, key rotation. Always on.

caregiver_revoked.label: Caregiver revoked
caregiver_revoked.description: Notification when you are removed from a household.

report.title: Kinhale care report
report.disclaimer: Kinhale is a cooperative journal kept by caregivers. It does not replace medical advice, does not diagnose, and does not recommend any treatment. It is not certified as a medical device under Health Canada, FDA, or CE rules. Your data stays under your exclusive control on your devices.

ui.description: Generate a locally-encrypted PDF summarising your child's doses and symptoms, ready to share with their doctor.
ui.generationError: Could not generate the report. Please try again.

errors.invalid_order: End date must be after start date.

ui.auditNotice: Generation is logged locally. Only the SHA-256 hash and the date range are sent to the server for audit (no health data).
ui.auditFailed: Report generated locally. Audit log sync will retry once online.

csv.description: Export every dose in the selected range as CSV (compatible with Excel and spreadsheets).
csv.generationError: Could not generate the CSV. Please try again.
csv.sharedNotice: Local share completed. No health data is sent to the server.
csv.shareUnavailable: System sharing is not available. Please use the Download button.

pdf.shareUnavailable: System sharing is not available. Please use the Download button.

signedLink.comingSoonTooltip: Coming in v1.1. For now please use Download or Share.

quietHours.title: Quiet hours
quietHours.description: During this window, non-critical notifications arrive without sound or vibration. Missed dose and security alerts remain active.
quietHours.saveError: Could not save. Please try again.
quietHours.safetyNote: Missed-dose notifications are still delivered even during quiet hours (safety rule).

accountDeletion.description: Permanently deletes your Kinhale household after a 7-day grace period. This action is irreversible once the grace period ends.
accountDeletion.consequences: Your technical data (devices, audit, preferences) will be erased from the server. Your health data stays on your devices and is never sent to the server.
accountDeletion.exportFirst: Before deleting, export your data from the section above to keep a local copy.
accountDeletion.stepUpSent: A confirmation link has been sent to your email. Click it within 5 minutes to confirm deletion.

errors.wordMismatch: The confirmation word does not match.
errors.emailMismatch: The email does not match this account.
errors.alreadyPending: A deletion is already pending for this account.
errors.network: Could not reach the server. Check your connection.

pending.bannerMessage: Your household will be permanently deleted on {{date}}. You can still cancel.
pending.cancelSuccess: Deletion cancelled. Your account is active again.
pending.cancelExpired: The cancellation deadline has passed — the purge will run shortly.

confirmPage.title: Confirm deletion
confirmPage.description: Click below to confirm the deletion of your Kinhale household. You will still have 7 days to change your mind.
confirmPage.successMessage: Your household will be deleted on {{date}}. You can cancel anytime from Settings → Privacy.
confirmPage.errorInvalidToken: This confirmation link is invalid or expired. Restart the procedure from Settings → Privacy.
confirmPage.errorTokenUsed: This link has already been used.
confirmPage.errorGeneric: Could not confirm deletion. Please retry.

cancelPage.title: Cancel deletion
cancelPage.description: Click below to cancel the deletion of your household.
cancelPage.successMessage: Your Kinhale household is active again.
cancelPage.errorExpired: The cancellation deadline has passed. The purge will run shortly.
cancelPage.errorNotPending: No deletion in progress for this account.

disclaimer.full: Kinhale is a cooperative journal kept by caregivers. It does not replace medical advice, does not diagnose, and does not recommend any treatment. It is not certified as a medical device under Health Canada, FDA, or CE rules. Your data stays under your exclusive control on your devices.

settingsAbout.title: About
settingsAbout.heading: About Kinhale
settingsAbout.description: Kinhale is an open-source project by Kamez Conseils. The app is a cooperative journal and coordination tool between caregivers — not a medical device.
settingsAbout.privacyPolicyDescription: Read the privacy policy dedicated to minors.

page.title: Household activity
page.subtitle: The 90 most recent events about your account. No health data is ever sent to the server — only opaque hashes and timestamps are stored.

privacyExport.title: Export my data
privacyExport.description: Exercise your right to data portability (GDPR art. 20 / Quebec Law 25 art. 30). The ZIP archive is generated entirely on your device — the Kinhale server never sees your health data.
privacyExport.contents: The archive contains: the full journal of doses (JSON + CSV), a printable HTML report, the technical metadata of your account (devices, audit trail, preferences), and a bilingual README with SHA-256 integrity hashes.
privacyExport.readyMessage: Archive ready. Download or share it from your device.
privacyExport.shareUnavailable: System sharing is not available. Use the Download button.
privacyExport.auditNotice: The export is logged locally. Only a hash and a timestamp are sent to the server (no health data).
privacyExport.auditFailed: Archive generated locally. Audit synchronization pending connection.
privacyExport.disclaimer: Kinhale is a tracking and coordination tool. This archive contains no medical interpretation, no dose recommendation, no diagnosis.
privacyExport.signedLinkComingSoon: Sending the archive by email via signed link will be available in v1.1.

errors.notReady: Your data is not yet loaded. Try again in a few seconds.
errors.metadataFailed: Could not retrieve metadata from the server. Check your connection.
errors.generationFailed: Could not generate the archive. Please try again.
